name: Koei Chemical Company, Limited
summary: Koei Chemical Company, Limited manufactures and sells various chemical products worldwide. Its products include ionic liquids; amines; methanol; pyridines and pyrazines; and formalin products and polyols, such as pentaerythritol, dipentaerythritol, and trimethylolpropane. The company was formerly known as Koei Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Koei Chemical Company, Limited in 1950. The company was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
